controls.control_id: CC1.1
controls.title: COSO principle 1 — Integrity and ethical values
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.control_id: CC1.2
controls.title: COSO principle 2 — Board independence and oversight
controls.description: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight.

controls.control_id: CC1.3
controls.title: COSO principle 3 — Management establishes structure, authority, and responsibility
controls.description: Management establishes structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities.

controls.control_id: CC1.4
controls.title: COSO principle 4 — Commitment to competence
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals.

controls.control_id: CC1.5
controls.title: COSO principle 5 — Accountability
controls.description: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities.

controls.control_id: CC2.1
controls.title: COSO principle 13 — Quality information
controls.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information.

controls.control_id: CC2.2
controls.title: COSO principle 14 — Internal communication
controls.description: The entity internally communicates information necessary to support functioning of internal control.

controls.control_id: CC2.3
controls.title: COSO principle 15 — External communication
controls.description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting functioning of internal control.

controls.control_id: CC3.1
controls.title: COSO principle 6 — Risk objectives
controls.description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable identification and assessment of risks.

controls.control_id: CC3.2
controls.title: COSO principle 7 — Risk identification and analysis
controls.description: The entity identifies risks and analyses risks as a basis for determining how risks should be managed.

controls.control_id: CC3.3
controls.title: COSO principle 8 — Fraud risk
controls.description: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks.

controls.control_id: CC3.4
controls.title: COSO principle 9 — Change management
controls.description: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal control.

controls.control_id: CC4.1
controls.title: COSO principle 16 — Ongoing and separate evaluations
controls.description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations.

controls.control_id: CC4.2
controls.title: COSO principle 17 — Deficiency communication
controls.description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner.

controls.control_id: CC5.1
controls.title: COSO principle 10 — Control activities selection
controls.description: The entity selects and develops control activities that mitigate risks.

controls.control_id: CC5.2
controls.title: COSO principle 11 — Technology controls
controls.description: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology.

controls.control_id: CC5.3
controls.title: COSO principle 12 — Policies and procedures
controls.description: The entity deploys control activities through policies and procedures.

controls.control_id: CC6.1
controls.title: Logical and physical access controls
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against unauthorized access.

controls.control_id: CC6.2
controls.title: Access provisioning
controls.description: Prior to issuing system credentials, the entity registers and authorizes new users.

controls.control_id: CC6.3
controls.title: Access removal
controls.description: The entity removes access to protected information when no longer needed.

controls.control_id: CC6.6
controls.title: System boundaries
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect unauthorized access at system boundaries.

controls.control_id: CC6.7
controls.title: Data in transit
controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission of data to authorized external parties.

controls.control_id: CC6.8
controls.title: Malicious software prevention
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect malicious software.

controls.control_id: CC7.1
controls.title: Anomaly detection
controls.description: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify anomalies.

controls.control_id: CC7.2
controls.title: Event monitoring
controls.description: The entity monitors system components for anomalies indicative of security events.

controls.control_id: CC7.3
controls.title: Security event evaluation
controls.description: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they constitute security incidents.

controls.control_id: CC7.4
controls.title: Incident response
controls.description: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response programme.

controls.control_id: CC7.5
controls.title: Incident recovery
controls.description: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.

controls.control_id: CC8.1
controls.title: Change management
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes.

controls.control_id: CC9.1
controls.title: Risk mitigation
controls.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities.

controls.control_id: CC9.2
controls.title: Vendor and business partner risk
controls.description: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.

controls.title: Availability commitments
controls.description: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity and use.

controls.title: Environmental protections and recovery
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, and implements controls for environmental threats and recovery.

controls.title: Confidentiality identification
controls.description: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information.

controls.title: Confidentiality disposal
controls.description: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet objectives.

controls.control_id: PI1.1
controls.title: Processing integrity — input completeness and accuracy
controls.description: The entity implements policies and procedures for completeness and accuracy of inputs.

controls.control_id: PI1.2
controls.title: Processing integrity — system processing
controls.description: The entity implements policies and procedures over system processing to result in products and services meeting specifications.

controls.title: Privacy notice
controls.description: The entity provides notice to data subjects about its privacy practices.

controls.title: Collection of personal information
controls.description: Personal information is collected consistent with the entity's objectives.

controls.title: Use of personal information
controls.description: The entity limits the use of personal information to the purposes identified in the notice.

controls.title: Disclosure of personal information
controls.description: The entity discloses personal information to third parties with consent or as identified in the notice.

controls.control_id: Goal hijack risk identified in risk assessment — prompt injection, indirect injection, multi-turn manipulation documented
controls.title: CC3.2
controls.description: Risk register with goal hijack entries, treatment status

controls.control_id: Runtime monitoring for goal-deviation indicators — AI-specific anomaly detection covering instruction-override patterns
controls.title: CC7.2
controls.description: Monitoring configuration, alert logs, incident records

controls.control_id: Control activities define acceptable agent actions — agent cannot deviate from authorised goal scope
controls.title: CC5.2
controls.description: Agent permission policy, goal-state verification design documentation

controls.control_id: Agent processing is authorised — actions taken by agent correspond to user's authorised intent, not attacker's injected instruction
controls.title: PI1.1
controls.description: Action audit log, authorisation records per agent session

controls.control_id: Control activities define tool permission scope — which tools are permitted, which parameters are valid, which actions require confirmation
controls.title: CC5.2
controls.description: Tool permission policy, permitted action allowlist

controls.control_id: Logical access controls enforce tool permissions — agent cannot invoke tools outside authorised scope
controls.title: CC6.1
controls.description: Tool invocation logs, access rejection records

controls.control_id: Monitoring for anomalous tool invocations — destructive parameters, out-of-scope tools, unexpected sequences detected
controls.title: CC7.2
controls.description: Tool call audit log, anomaly alert records

controls.control_id: Tool invocations are complete and accurate — parameter validation ensures tool calls match intended business operation
controls.title: PI1.2
controls.description: Validation configuration, rejected call logs

controls.control_id: Agent credentials managed as logical access assets — provisioning, scope, rotation, revocation per access management policy
controls.title: CC6.1
controls.description: Credential lifecycle records, provisioning logs

controls.control_id: Credentials revoked at session end — no persistent credential caching in agent memory after session terminates
controls.title: CC6.3
controls.description: Session termination logs, credential TTL configuration

controls.control_id: Credential usage monitored — anomalous scope expansion or after-session access detected
controls.title: CC7.3
controls.description: Credential audit log, anomaly alert records

controls.control_id: Agent credentials treated as confidential information — stored in secrets manager, access-controlled
controls.title: C1.1
controls.description: Secrets management configuration, access control evidence

controls.control_id: Third-party agentic components assessed — agent frameworks, tool vendors, model providers subject to vendor risk management
controls.title: CC9.2
controls.description: Vendor assessments, contractual security obligations

controls.control_id: Component changes managed through change management — model updates, framework upgrades, tool changes require security review
controls.title: CC8.1
controls.description: Change management records, security review sign-offs

controls.control_id: Agentic supply chain risk included in risk assessment — compromised component scenarios documented with treatment
controls.title: CC3.3
controls.description: Risk register with supply chain entries

controls.control_id: Integrity checks required before component deployment — cryptographic verification of model weights and tool descriptors
controls.title: CC5.3
controls.description: Integrity verification configuration, deployment logs

controls.control_id: Control activities define permitted code execution scope — sandbox requirements, approved languages, forbidden operations
controls.title: CC5.2
controls.description: Code execution policy, sandbox configuration

controls.control_id: Execution sandboxes access-controlled — no host filesystem or network access without authorisation
controls.title: CC6.1
controls.description: Sandbox configuration, access control evidence

controls.control_id: Code execution events monitored — syscall patterns, network calls, and filesystem access from sandboxes logged
controls.title: CC7.2
controls.description: Execution audit log, alert configuration

controls.control_id: Code execution is authorised — agent cannot execute code that was not explicitly requested by authorised user
controls.title: PI1.1
controls.description: Code execution authorisation records

controls.control_id: Memory poisoning risk documented in risk assessment — scenarios for RAG, persistent memory, and context window corruption
controls.title: CC3.3
controls.description: Risk register with memory poisoning entries

controls.control_id: Agent memory stores monitored for unexpected modifications — baseline established, deviations trigger alerts
controls.title: CC7.2
controls.description: Memory access log, anomaly alert configuration

controls.control_id: Processing based on compromised memory is not authorised — memory integrity controls support PI1 evidence
controls.title: PI1.1
controls.description: Integrity verification configuration

controls.control_id: Controls on memory store write access — only authorised processes may write to agent memory stores
controls.title: CC5.2
controls.description: Memory access policy, write access controls

controls.control_id: Inter-agent authentication required — all agent-to-agent messages authenticated before acting
controls.title: CC6.1
controls.description: mTLS configuration, certificate management records

controls.control_id: Inter-agent communication policy — which agents may communicate with which, under what conditions, with what data
controls.title: CC5.2
controls.description: Inter-agent communication policy document

controls.control_id: Inter-agent traffic monitored — unexpected communication patterns, unauthorised agent requests detected
controls.title: CC7.2
controls.description: Inter-agent traffic logs, anomaly alert records

controls.control_id: Third-party agents treated as vendor risk — agents from external providers assessed before integration
controls.title: CC9.2
controls.description: Vendor assessment records for third-party agents

controls.control_id: Availability commitments defined for multi-agent system — RTO/RPO documented; cascade failure scenarios in availability risk
controls.title: A1.1
controls.description: Availability SLA, BCP documentation

controls.control_id: Capacity and performance monitoring — early warning of cascade failure precursors (latency, error rate, queue depth)
controls.title: A1.2
controls.description: Monitoring dashboards, alert configuration

controls.control_id: Cascade failure incidents detected and responded to — incident response procedures for multi-agent failures
controls.title: CC7.3
controls.description: IR plan covering cascade scenarios, incident records

controls.control_id: Cascade failure risk in risk assessment — blast radius analysis, dependency mapping documented
controls.title: CC3.3
controls.description: Risk register with cascade failure entries

controls.control_id: AI disclosure policy — users informed when interacting with AI agents; deceptive design patterns prohibited
controls.title: CC5.3
controls.description: AI disclosure policy, UI evidence

controls.control_id: Trust exploitation risk in risk assessment — social engineering, impersonation, false urgency scenarios documented
controls.title: CC3.3
controls.description: Risk register with trust exploitation entries

controls.control_id: Agent outputs are accurate and complete — outputs not designed to mislead; factual accuracy controls for high-stakes outputs
controls.title: PI1.3
controls.description: Output quality controls, factual accuracy testing

controls.control_id: Accuracy of personal data in AI outputs — privacy criteria require that AI-generated information about individuals is accurate
controls.title: P7.1
controls.description: Accuracy review procedures

controls.control_id: Continuous monitoring for rogue agent behaviour — actions outside authorised scope detected and alerted
controls.title: CC7.2
controls.description: Agent action audit log, anomaly alert records

controls.control_id: Access controls define authorised agent scope — technical enforcement of what agents may and may not do
controls.title: CC6.1
controls.description: Permission policy, access control configuration

controls.control_id: Rogue agent risk in risk assessment — autonomous agent operating outside scope is a documented risk
controls.title: CC3.3
controls.description: Risk register with rogue agent scenarios

controls.control_id: Rogue agent impact on availability — resource consumption by rogue agents does not degrade service for authorised operations
controls.title: A1.1
controls.description: Resource monitoring, quota enforcement records

controls.control_id: Excessive agency risks identified � what autonomous actions can the LLM take, what is the blast radius
controls.title: CC3.2 � Risk assessment

controls.control_id: System prompts classified as confidential � encryption at rest, access-controlled, not in cleartext config
controls.title: C2.1 � Confidential information protection

controls.control_id: Access controls on system prompt storage � only authorised personnel can read or modify, all access logged
controls.title: CC6.1 � Logical access

controls.control_id: System prompt security procedures � version control, rotation, extraction resistance testing documented
controls.title: CC5.2 � Control activities

controls.control_id: Access to system prompt storage monitored � anomalous access attempts detected and alerted
controls.title: CC7.2 � Monitoring

controls.control_id: Embeddings of confidential information protected � encrypted at rest, access-controlled, inversion-resistant
controls.title: C2.1 � Confidential information protection

controls.control_id: RBAC on all vector store collections � no unauthenticated access in any environment
controls.title: CC6.1 � Logical access

controls.control_id: Anomaly detection on vector store query patterns � bulk extraction and unusual retrieval volumes detected
controls.title: CC7.2 � Anomaly detection

controls.control_id: Embeddings of personal data used only for authorised purposes � privacy commitments apply to derived forms
controls.title: P5.1 � Personal information use

controls.control_id: Policy on LLM output accuracy � acceptable accuracy thresholds, verification requirements for high-stakes use cases
controls.title: PI1.1 � Processing integrity policy

controls.control_id: LLM inputs (RAG sources, training data) quality controls � authoritative, current, verified sources
controls.title: PI1.2 � System inputs are complete and accurate

controls.control_id: Misinformation risk identified in LLM risk assessment � harm potential of incorrect outputs per use case
controls.title: CC3.2 � Risk assessment

controls.control_id: Production monitoring for accuracy degradation and hallucination patterns � drift detection
controls.title: CC7.2 � Anomaly detection

controls.control_id: LLM service availability commitments documented � SLAs, RTO/RPO, resource limits that protect availability
controls.title: A1.1 � Availability policies

controls.control_id: Rate limiting and resource controls protect LLM service availability � implemented and monitored
controls.title: A1.2 � Environmental protections

controls.control_id: Real-time monitoring of LLM resource consumption � cost anomalies and unusual volume patterns alerted
controls.title: CC7.2 � Anomaly detection

controls.control_id: Resource exhaustion risks identified in LLM risk assessment � DoS and sponge attack vectors assessed
controls.title: CC3.2 � Risk assessment
